product_depth.justification: README accurately describes two-plugin architecture with complete install commands, architecture diagram, domain skills table, and standalone usage note.

functionality.justification: All 6 verification steps from features.json satisfied. Two-plugin overview, install commands, architecture diagram, domain skills table, standalone note, artifact layout all present.

visual_design.justification: Clean markdown with consistent heading hierarchy. Tables properly formatted. Architecture diagram clear and accurate.

code_quality.justification: Zero references to old single-plugin structure. No broken links. All paths reference actual directory structure.

contract_checks.evidence: README intro describes two-plugin architecture; 'Two plugins' line present
Install section updated: marketplace installs both, git clone uses harness repo, install.sh note mentions both plugins
Architecture section shows both plugins/harness/ and plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/ trees
Domain Skills (SDLC Suite) section with table referencing all 5 skills from the suite
Standalone note present in intro and architecture section
Artifact layout shows .harness/ structure; architecture diagram shows plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/
grep for long-running-harness returns 0 matches -- no old single-plugin references

feature_evidence.reason: README documents two-plugin architecture overview, updated install commands for both plugins, architecture diagram showing both plugin trees, domain skills table referencing SDLC suite, standalone usage note, and artifact layout with harness-sdlc-suite/. Zero references to old single-plugin structure.

internal_consistency.justification: README uses consistent markdown conventions throughout. Tables, headings, code blocks all follow the same style.

intentionality.justification: Architecture diagram reflects actual directory structure. Install commands reference actual repository. Domain profiles match SDLC suite content.

craft.justification: Clean heading hierarchy, proper table formatting, readable code blocks with language hints.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: A developer can understand the two-plugin architecture, install both plugins, and use the harness standalone from reading the README alone.
